items.title: Postdraft questions for all 32 NFL teams: What could A.J. Brown cost Pats? Did Raiders help Mendoza? Why Ty Simpson?
items.body_text: The 2026 NFL draft is over, but can the rookies make an impact? We answer lingering questions for all 32 teams.
items.author: NFL Nation reporters

items.title: The best, worst and most confusing of the 2026 draft: Our experts answer 29 questions
items.body_text: What were the best selections in each round? Which teams filled their needs?
items.author: Matt Miller and Jordan Reid

items.title: Tomlin: Exit partly rooted in recent playoff woes
items.body_text: Mike Tomlin told NBC's Maria Taylor that he walked away, in part, because of the recent lack of playoff success and a belief that some of his veterans were "worthy of the excitement and the optimism associated with new leadership."
items.author: Brooke Pryor

items.title: Source: Pavia accepts invite to Ravens minicamp
items.body_text: Undrafted Vanderbilt quarterback Diego Pavia, one of the most polarizing figures in college football, accepted an invitation to attend next weekend's rookie minicamp with the Baltimore Ravens, a source told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Sunday afternoon.
items.author: Jamison Hensley

items.title: LB Coleman, one of Washington's 'greatest,' dies
items.body_text: Monte Coleman, the hard-nosed linebacker who won three Super Bowls with Washington and later coached Arkansas-Pine Bluff to a conference championship, has died. He was 68.

items.title: McCoy falls to Raiders at No. 101, says knee fine
items.body_text: Jermod McCoy says his knee feels good, adding it's up to the Raiders on whether he undergoes another surgery after missing all of 2025 with a torn ACL.
items.author: Ryan McFadden

items.title: After wait, Nussmeier sees Chiefs as 'great' spot
items.body_text: The Kansas City Chiefs used their final pick in the NFL draft to select former LSU quarterback Garrett Nussmeier in the seventh round Saturday.
items.author: Nate Taylor

items.title: Browns draft Green, will proceed with 4-QB room
items.body_text: The Browns stayed busy on the quarterback front, selecting Arkansas' Taylen Green in the sixth round (No. 182) Saturday.
items.author: Daniel Oyefusi

items.title: Harbaugh: Met with Nabers, cool with his honesty
items.body_text: Giants coach John Harbaugh met and had a "great conversation" with Malik Nabers the morning after the standout wide receiver made headlines with his comments during the first round of the NFL draft.
items.author: Jordan Raanan

items.title: Broncos make Buffalo LB Murdock 'Mr. Irrelevant'
items.body_text: The Broncos made Buffalo linebacker Red Murdock "Mr. Irrelevant" as the last pick of this year's NFL draft.
items.author: Jeff Legwold

items.title: 🍌 Russell Wilson joins Savannah Bananas outing
items.body_text: The Super Bowl XLVIII-winning quarterback also took a swing for the Savannah Bananas and almost recorded a hit.
items.author: Kalan Hooks

items.title: Kiper's grades for all 32 NFL draft classes: Why the Cowboys and Jets aced their picks
items.body_text: Mel Kiper Jr. evaluates the entire 2026 NFL draft, from the good (Cowboys, Jets) to the very questionable (Rams). See all 32 teams' grades.
items.author: Mel Kiper Jr.

items.title: The NFL draft is over ... let's overreact: Will the Cardinals and Rams regret their picks?
items.body_text: It's time to weigh in on the biggest overreactions of NFL draft weekend.
items.author: Dan Graziano

items.title: Which teams won -- and lost -- on Day 2 of the NFL draft? Kiper on the best values, biggest reaches

items.title: What could the Patriots trade the Eagles for A.J. Brown?
items.body_text: Discussing trade scenarios with Dave Caldwell and recapping the Pats' 2026 NFL draft in this week's notebook.
items.author: Mike Reiss

items.title: Cowboys' great Darren Woodson on Caleb Downs: 'Yes sirrr!'
items.body_text: Dallas hopes Downs, the No. 11 draft pick, will use his versatility and leadership to quarterback the defense.
items.author: Todd Archer

items.title: How Rams quietly zeroed in on Ty Simpson in the draft -- and kept it a secret
items.body_text: While the Rams always try to mute their plans, they found that process magnified when it came to the QB position.
